name: 男女身體互換
description: 女主用法術與男主互換身體，製造大量尷尬和喜劇情境（女主在男體中想量尺寸、男主在女體中害羞），既是搞笑橋段也推進了感情線。
tags: 性別錯位帶來的視覺喜劇，角色用對方身體做出反差行為

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Set. Heaven and earth profound in yellow... What did you do to me?... I've always wanted to find a man body to play around with. It's only 20 minutes... where are you going? I'm going to look for a ruler. You wouldn't dare.
examples.context: 性別錯位帶來的視覺喜劇，角色用對方身體做出反差行為
